# UC-22.3.46 · DORA Art.7 — Cisco ISE PSN Capacity SLO Evidence (ICT Resilience)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** ITOps &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Capacity

*We continuously evidence DORA Art.7 — ISE NAC capacity headroom for ICT resilience. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence DORA Art.7 — ISE NAC capacity headroom for ICT resilience.

## Value

DORA's hallmark is quantitative ICT resilience. NAC capacity is foundational; this UC's daily archived evidence is the regulator-quality artefact.

## Implementation

Hourly aggregation; daily evidence archive.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with DORA Art.7 tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Generate load that drives a PSN to <30% headroom. Evidence captured.

### Negative scenario

All PSNs >50% headroom. Healthy capacity attestation.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.77 operational; `ise_psn_capacity.csv` populated.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.3.46: DORA Art.7 — ISE Capacity Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.3.46,reg=DORA,clause=Art.7
```

Quarterly review with DORA-aligned ICT risk management board.

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (5200, 5400) earliest=-1h
| bin _time span=1m
| stats count as auth_count by _time, host
| eval tps=round(auth_count/60, 1)
| lookup ise_psn_capacity.csv host OUTPUT psn_max_tps
| eval headroom_pct=round(((psn_max_tps - tps) / psn_max_tps) * 100, 1)
| eval dora_clause="Art.7", control="ICT_Capacity"
| stats min(headroom_pct) as min_headroom, avg(headroom_pct) as avg_headroom by host
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

DORA Art.7 panel: PSN headroom; capacity gauge.

## Known False Positives

1. Morning login storm peaks.

## References

- [DORA Regulation (EU) 2022/2554](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2022/2554/oj)
